title: If youre not a fan of the first move watch the second before calling it quits
display_title: If youre not a fan of the first move watch the second before calling it quits
wikitext:
[]: If you're not a fan of the first move, watch the second before calling it quits.             Quote Post by Riptide » Sun Feb 23, 2025 8:08 am I know I'm way late to the party here, but despite being a big fan of NGE+EOE I didn't start watching the the rebuilds until recently. I wasn't a huge fan of 1.11. It felt rushed, I felt like they left out some important elements, and I didn't like how much emphasis was put on Misato's serious side. It was trying to tell an almost identical story to episodes 1-6 with less total screen time and I felt like the episodes just did a better job. After watching 2.22 yesterday though, I'm hooked. Now we have an entirely different story that felt like "New NGE" and there was no true episode equivalent to compare it to. On the off chance the big NGE+EOE fans out there that haven't given the rebuilts a watch yet happen to read this thread, don't give up after the first, at least watch the second.

[]: Re: If you're not a fan of the first move, watch the second before calling it quits.             Quote Post by Superblunt » Sun Feb 23, 2025 9:09 am Well, let's see what you say after the third one

[]: Re: If you're not a fan of the first move, watch the second before calling it quits.             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Mon Feb 24, 2025 11:26 pm I'm a huge fan of the first movie and its vibe, but don't really like the second But I might be the only person I know who prefers JO over HA...

[]: Re: If you're not a fan of the first move, watch the second before calling it quits.             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Tue Feb 25, 2025 5:34 pm BernardoCairo wrote: I'm a huge fan of the first movie and its vibe, but don't really like the second But I might be the only person I know who prefers JO over HA...

[]: Re: If you're not a fan of the first move, watch the second before calling it quits.             Quote Post by Diego the Lego » Tue Sep 23, 2025 9:52 am I agree, 2.22 was definitely the point where I became really invested in the series. I was always going to watch the rebuild movies since I love the original run + EoE. 1.11 was solid, but with it following the first 6 episodes of the series so closely it didn't leave as much of an impact as the others for me knowing whether the characters would live or die and the general direction the plot was going, but the ending to 2.22 I think was what really brought it all home. Also I'm lucky because I got to watch all of the rebuild films within the span of like a week but I couldn't imagine being in the audience watching the movies when they came out and having to wait years to see how the story would conclude!
